title: Metallica
excerpt: Four guys playing a lot of great songs...
terms: Metallica, Copenhell, Heavy Hetfield, Trash Metal

title: Photos From Hell
excerpt: A collection of photographs from Copenhell. Between 21-23 June 2018, I visited the metal festival Copenhell in Copenhagen, Denmark, for the first time. I can already tell you that it will not be the last.
terms: At The Gates, Helloween, Ozzy Osbourne, Copenhell

title: Slipknot
excerpt: Slipknot entered the stage at Copenhell and opened with the track People = Shit from the album Iowa. The entire place exploded. All photos taken at Copenhell in Copenhagen, Danmark.

title: You don’t like us. You love us!
excerpt: On a rainy September evening in 2017 The Hives walked on the stage at Liseberg to play their two favourite kinds of music. Rock and Roll.
